mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reservation (order_id, user_id, item_name, category, amount, status, image_url, check_in, check_out, address, details) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{userId}, #{itemName}, #{category}, #{amount}, #{status}, #{imageUrl}, #{checkIn}, #{checkOut}, #{address}, #{details})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT * FROM reservation WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT * FROM reservation WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT r.*, u.nickname FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
